chapters.title: Introduction to Go
chapters.description: Welcome to Go! Let's write your first program.

chapters.title: Go Basics: Variables & Types
chapters.description: Learn how Go stores data with variables and types.

chapters.title: Control Flow: If/Else & Switch
chapters.description: Make decisions in your code with conditional statements.

chapters.title: Iteration: Loops in Go
chapters.description: Master the 'for' loop, Go's only looping construct.

chapters.title: Functions & Packages
chapters.description: Organize your code into reusable pieces.

chapters.title: Arrays, Slices & Maps
chapters.description: Store and manipulate collections of data efficiently.

chapters.title: Pointers & Structs
chapters.description: Unlock the power of memory addresses and custom data types.

chapters.title: Methods & Interfaces
chapters.description: Discover Go's unique approach to object-oriented programming.

chapters.title: Concurrency: Goroutines & Channels
chapters.description: Run multiple tasks at the same time seamlessly.

chapters.title: Error Handling & Defer
chapters.description: Write robust code by handling unexpected issues gracefully.
